education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science

bullets: Built an AI-powered K8s debugging MCP server enabling self-serve ephemeral environment troubleshooting via Claude Code, eliminating  100 DevOps tickets/month and reducing MTTR from 2 days to minutes.
Migrated manual Confluent Kafka provisioning model to automated IAAC based provisioning model with zero downtime using Terraform
Migrated 10+ Kafka clusters across AWS DC with zero downtime, which resulted in improvement of 50ms per request
Maintained PCI DSS compliant infrastructure — network segmentation, encrypted data flows, quarterly access reviews, and automated audit trail retention via CloudTrail

Led the design and development of payment pipelines and enterprise-level automation related to microservice applications saving cost of 1FTE per month using the latest technologies of Python, Jenkins, Helm.
Engineered rate-limiting and traffic shaping for payment APIs during IPL 2024 peak load (3x normal traffic) — zero transaction drops, maintained SLA under surge
Designed and implemented alerting schema reducing unwanted alerts by 80% using Helm, Prometheus, Grafana and EKS.
Operated 99.99% availability infrastructure for payment-critical services across multi-AZ EKS 10+ AWS accounts — automated failover, canary deployments, zero-downtime patching
Deployed OpenDKIM implementation as a go-service to mitigate excessive RAM consumption using Golang, Linux and AWS Lambda
Built zero-touch credential rotation system Python + SecretManager meeting SOC2 rotation requirements, removing human access to production secrets entirely
Developed serverless implementation to draw mail delivery insights using AWS Lambdas
Migrated 7000+ on-prem servers to use SaaS for email delivery and security using enterprise software
Implemented VPS on-prem server migrations and additions as a part of Growth projects
Built an Openshift operator to manifest a highly available private rpm mirror using Golang
Improved scalability of mirror web app to improvise the package management, deployed in production with an integrated WebUI
